domain: Coral fluorescent protein photoprotection (GFP-like chromoproteins absorb harmful blue/UV and re-emit at safe longer wavelengths; energy partially conserved as photosynthesis-usable, partially dissipated as heat)
specific_mechanism: Inference-time spectral remapping: harmful frequency band absorbed and re-emitted at a calibrated safe band, with partial energy conservation.
llm_application: FRECONV: inference-time spectral adapter that decomposes the pre-attention activation in eigenspace, classifies eigenbands as harmful (historically correlated with jailbreak/adversarial signatures) or benign, REMAPS harmful-band energy into a calibrated safe eigenband (partially preserving information), and forwards the spectrum-rebalanced activation. Trained with energy-conservation + safety-rebalancing dual objective.
novelty_claim: Hallucination Detection via Spectral Attention (2502.17598) detects, doesn't shift. Spectral Filters/Dark Signals (2402.09221) drops bands rather than re-emit. Spectral Sphere Optimizer (2601.08393) is training-time. None do inference-time spectral SHIFT of harmful eigenbands into safe ones, with energy partly conserved (analogous to coral fluorescence).
